channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti, 29th March
item.description:
Near block 110-124, crescent House Remove graffiti from salt box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coldbath Street, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes, 29th March
item.description:
Large potholes along the centre of the road 5 foot long and ovar 1 foot wide!!! Can’t photo them, too dangerous!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned motorcycle, 29th March
item.description:
An abandoned motorcycle left outside our property for over 2 weeks now, its an inconvenience and eyesore. Any help or support would be most appreciated, thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87a, Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 29th March
item.description:
Huge potholes along centre of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 29th March
item.description:
Huge potholes along the centre of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car, 29th March
item.description:
Someone has abandoned a car outside our house. It has been there for weeks now. I made a report to the council 3 weeks ago but nothing has been done. Could something be done about this asap please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Drive, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyppstering, 29th March
item.description:
Outse no 44/60 Coldbath Street Remove offensive flypostering from 3M031

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coldbath Street, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two shopping trolleys abandoned, 29th March
item.description:
There are two interlocked Sainsbury's trolleys left here, just by the gates at the entrance to the car park at the back of the Old Police Station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on pavement, 29th March
item.description:
Sharp pieces of broken glass right in the middle of the pavement, could be dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Adelaide Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Lamp - Control Plate, 29th March
item.description:
The plate that covers the controls has come off & and internal workings are exposed. Please can this be corrected. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 29th March
item.description:
Ditch Alleyway Please clear flytip of black bags from side of footpath

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposteromg, 29th March
item.description:
Outside no 47, Remove flypostering from Post

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 29th March
item.description:
Deptford Bridge junction of Greenwich. high Road. Please flypostering from lamppost cars for sale

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double parking, 29th March
item.description:
Double parking—defined as parking on the carriageway side of another vehicle already parked at the kerb—is illegal in the UK, as it causes obstruction and violates traffic rules. Fines are not being issued and the council are even within their right to have these vehicles removed but continue to ignore the issue. These are not temporary stops as you can see from the pictures same vehicles are there in the day time and when I return home late at night. This has been going on for more than a year and is becoming worse as the council are not doing their job.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rollins Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 29th March
item.description:
The car on the right has been dumped here for several weeks. There is a note from London Fire Brigade on it saying they couldn’t attend an incident as a fire engine can’t fit through. The left hand side of the road is double yellow lines but as Lewisham Council don’t maintain the lines and the road sweeper doesn’t sweep the leaves away drivers can make excuses and use this loophole to park there. Cars on both sides of the road make it difficult for emergency vehicles, large vans and even standard cars to get through. Ongoing issue for several months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rollins Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped vehicles, 29th March
item.description:
These vehicles are dumped on double yellow lines in a clearly marked controlled parking zone. You can’t see oncoming traffic when turning into Lovelinch Close. What are parking control even doing to enforce parking in the area? Vehicles are dumped here because parking is not enforced and they are not towed. Yet residents have to pay for the privilege to park here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rollins Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive parking + abandoned van, 29th March
item.description:
Van hasn’t moved in months. No permit for the block and over the white line. Makes it impossible for scooter to drive out in the motorcycle bay right beside it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pembury Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised car with no permit. Sitting with parking tickets, 29th March
item.description:
This car has been sitting here for a month with no permit

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped box of rubble, 29th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped a plastic container full of bricks and rubble ,this has been there for 4 days now , in the enterance to Hainault st (cul di sac ) enterance , next door to the bungalow in blanmarle rd ,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blanmerle Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all up the street, 29th March
item.description:
Large wood pallets all up the street. Washing machine on the corner. Really annoying!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
